battle_traits.name: Always Three Clawsteps Ahead
battle_traits.description: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat. That unit can use the 'Normal Move' ability as if it were your movement phase.
battle_traits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat.

regiment_abilities.name: Warpstone-Laced Armour
regiment_abilities.description: Your Stormfiends unit has Ward (4+) this phase.

regiment_abilities.name: Endless Swarm of Rats
regiment_abilities.description: When a friendly Clanrats unit uses its 'Seething Swarm' ability, you can return D6 slain models to that unit instead of D3.

enhancements.name: Skilled Manipulator
enhancements.description: Your general has Ward (4+) while they are within 1" of any friendly Clanrats units.

enhancements.name: Skitterleap
enhancements.description: On a 6+, remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units. They cannot use Move abilities in the following movement phase.

enhancements.name: Cage of Warp Lightning
enhancements.description: On a 2+, the enemy unit has Strike-last this phase. On a 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on your general.
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of your general and roll a dice.

enhancements.name: Scurry Away
enhancements.description: Roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can immediately use the 'Retreat' ability as if it were your movement phase. If it does so, no mortal damage is inflicted on it.

passive_abilities.name: Will of the Horned Rat
passive_abilities.description: On a 3+, add the roll to the target's control score until the start of your next turn.
passive_abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.

passive_abilities.name: Wither
passive_abilities.description: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
passive_abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

units.name: Stormfiends
units.loadout_note: 1 model with Shock Gauntlets; 1 model with Windlaunchers and Clubbing Blows; 1 model with Ratling Cannons and Clubbing Blows.

passive_abilities.name: Shock Gauntlets
passive_abilities.description: Each time an attack made with this unit's Shock Gauntlets scores a critical hit, that attack scores D6 hits instead of 1 (make a wound roll for each hit).

weapons.name: Warp Lightning Blast
weapons.note: Each hit inflicts 1 mortal damage and the attack sequence ends. Wound/Rend/Damage stats are not used.

passive_abilities.name: Warp Lightning Blast
passive_abilities.description: Each attack made with this weapon in a single phase must target the same enemy unit. Each hit inflicts 1 mortal damage on the target and the attack sequence ends.

passive_abilities.name: Seething Swarm
passive_abilities.description: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
